title: Predicting Cell Populations in Single Cell Mass Cytometry Data.
author: Abdelaal T van Unen V Hollt T Koning F Reinders MJT Mahfouz A
content: S-EPMC6767556 PMC6767556 Predicting Cell Populations in Single Cell Mass Cytometry Data. Mass cytometry by time-of-flight (CyTOF) is a valuable technology for high-dimensional analysis at the single cell level. Identification of different cell populations is an important task during the data
